title: Ferment Ciabatta Wrap
description: A fresh and light Indian-inspired wrap featuring high-protein-friendly ciabatta bread, ideal for a festive snack or meal.

ingredients.name: Honey Mustard Sauce
ingredients.notes: Sweet and tangy to complement the wrap

ingredients.name: Pickled Radish
ingredients.notes: For a pop of color and crunch

instructions: Toast the ciabatta slice until golden brown and slightly crisp.
In a small bowl, mix honey mustard sauce with pickled radish for a unique flavor combination.
Arrange lettuce leaves in a circle on a plate. Place toasted ciabatta on top of the lettuce leaves.
Add cucumber slices on top of the ciabatta.
Drizzle tzatziki sauce over the wrap and sprinkle with the honey mustard-radish mixture.
Serve immediately as a high-protein-friendly snack or meal.
